title: Identity Session Anomaly Starter
description: Starter pack for investigating suspicious identity session activity across identity and SIEM telemetry.

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Logical tenant, environment, or customer identifier.

parameters.name: lookback_hours
parameters.description: How many hours of telemetry to search.

parameters.name: focus_user
parameters.description: Optional user identifier to prioritize during the hunt.

notes: Starter example pack used to prove registry loading, inspection, and parameter validation before the real pack library ships.
